## What changed
This PR introduces a new Pull Request template to improve communication and code review hygiene. It also adds a self-review checklist in the docs folder.

## Why
Standardizing PR descriptions helps the team understand changes quickly and ensures that every contribution meets our quality standards.

## How to test
1. create a new branch and try to open a PR to see if this template loads automatically.
2. vavigate to the docs/ folder and verify that pr-checklist.md is presenrnt 
3. follow the new instructions in the README.md to ensure the project runs as expected

## Checklist
- [ ]  I have verified that the template is over 100 characters 
- [ ] I have Checked my code for any sensitve information for debug print.
- [ ] updated the documentation to reflect my changes.
